results.title: Beara
results.creator_credit: Paddy Carey, Richard Bigham and Rosemead Films
results.brief_description: Shows many aspects of the landscape and bird life of the Beara Peninsula region in the Cork-Kerry area of the south west of Ireland. No spoken commentary.

results.title: Beachworm! [the art of beachworming]
results.brief_description: Successful fishing is dependent on good bait and beach worms are one of the finest bait around. Professional wormer, Dan Fuller, meets presenter John Stewart on the Gold Coast and gives him the low down on day and night worming, covering aspects such as locating pippies for the berley, the mechanics of how to pull worms from the sand, place it on the hook, what sort of fish your likely to find on the end of the line, storage, legal limits and the dangers of night worming. Bloopers follow the final credits.

results.title: Battered women: violence behind closed doors
results.creator_credit: Christina Crowley, J. Gary Mitchell and J Gary Mitchell Film Company
results.brief_description: Examines the problem of wife beating and points out new methods of police intervention in cases of domestic violence. Includes interviews with abusive men and victimised women, encouraging women to speak out and seek protection from violent husbands.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Christina Crowley, J. Gary Mitchell and J Gary Mitchell Film Company

results.title: Basketball: the free throw
results.brief_description:
Episode of Series “Basketball Skills”.
One in a series of films on basketball skills, giving instruction and demonstration of basketball techniques, including slow-motion action and training routines. With Bill Foster and Gail Goodrich.
